hero.title: Mount Zion Pentecostal Ministries
hero.subtitle: Where Faith Comes Alive
hero.verse: "For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them." — Matthew 18:20

about.heading: About Our Ministry
about.pastor_bio: Pastor Joshua Matthew is the founding leader and visionary of Mount Zion Pentecostal Ministries. With a passionate heart for God's Word and a commitment to Spirit-filled ministry, he has dedicated his life to preaching the gospel with power and transforming lives through Christ. Known for his anointed sermons, fervent worship leading, and compassionate pastoral care, Pastor Joshua has built Mount Zion into a thriving spiritual community. His ministry is grounded in prayer, faith, and the supernatural power of the Holy Spirit, inspiring countless believers to walk in holiness and fulfill God's purpose.
about.leadership_sub: Dedicated servants of God working together for the kingdom
about.l1_desc: Seasoned preacher focused on discipleship and spiritual growth
about.l2_desc: Passionate intercessor leading our prayer ministry
about.l3_desc: Spirit-filled worshipper directing our worship experiences

hq.heading: Mount Zion Head Quarters
hq.body: Mount Zion Pentecostal Ministries is a vibrant spiritual community and the heart of our growing global mission. We gather believers in faith, worship, and transformation — raising leaders and spreading the message of Christ with passion and purpose.
hq.h1_desc: Hundreds of believers growing together in faith, prayer and the Spirit.
hq.h2_desc: Founded by Pastor Joshua Matthew — a God-appointed preacher, singer and leader.
hq.h3_desc: Multiple branches planted across regions, spreading the gospel of Christ.

worship.title: Worship & Prayer Services
worship.lead: Join us in powerful worship and prayer throughout the week. All are welcome!
worship.cta_text: New to Mount Zion? We would love to welcome you this Sunday!

events.heading: Upcoming Events
events.sub: Join us for our upcoming services, conferences and prayer gatherings.

testimonials.heading: What Our Members Say
testimonials.sub: Real stories of real lives changed by God's grace.
testimonials.t1_quote: Mount Zion has transformed our family's faith journey. The Word of God is preached with such power and love here. We are truly blessed to be part of this ministry.
testimonials.t2_quote: I was going through the darkest time of my life when I walked into Mount Zion. Through the prayers, worship and teachings, God completely restored me. Praise the Lord!
testimonials.t3_quote: Pastor's anointed preaching and the spirit-filled worship at Mount Zion have helped me grow immensely in my walk with God. This is truly a house of God.

youtube.heading: Watch Us on YouTube
youtube.sub: Subscribe to Mount Zion Pentecostal Ministries for live streams, sermons, worship songs and revival recordings.
youtube.subscribe_info: 190+ videos · Live sermons · Revival services · Telugu worship songs

contact.heading: Plan Your Visit & Prayer Requests
contact.sub: We would love to pray with you and welcome you to our church family.
